## LibraryRuntime.ProducedConfectionBase class

Mutable wrapper base class for IProducedConfection with undo/redo support. Provides common editing methods and history management.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare abstract class ProducedConfectionBase<T extends AnyProducedConfectionEntity> 
```

## Remarks

The constructor for this class is marked as internal. Third-party code should not call the constructor directly or create subclasses that extend the `ProducedConfectionBase` class.

[redo()](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.producedconfectionbase.redo.md)


</td><td>


</td><td>

[removeFillingSlot(slotId)](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.producedconfectionbase.removefillingslot.md)

<tr><td>

[scaleToYield(yieldSpec)](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.producedconfectionbase.scaletoyield.md)


</td><td>


</td><td>

Scales to a new yield specification. Pushes current state to undo before change, clears redo.

Note: This method updates the yield in the confection data. Actual filling scaling must be handled at a higher level (e.g., in sessions) where the filling library is accessible.


</td></tr>
